name: Crédito Texas
description_short: Crédito Texas is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 155 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Crédito Texas is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. With 155 Google reviews and a 5.0/5.0 rating, Crédito Texas has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a credit counseling service, Crédito Texas provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Crédito Texas operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Crédito Texas should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
